name: Phase 2 anti-tau monoclonal antibody in PSP
population: Probable PSP-Richardson syndrome per MDS-PSP 2017 criteria
eligibility: Age 40-80; PSPRS within a defined window; able to walk 5 steps unaided; CSF or tau-PET confirmation of tauopathy

intervention.mechanism: binds extracellular N-terminal tau to block trans-synaptic seeding and spread

primary_endpoint: Change from baseline in PSP Rating Scale (PSPRS) at 52 weeks

powering.assumed_effect: 30% slowing of PSPRS progression vs placebo
